name: Barbell Pullover
lead: Exercise for back, chest and triceps

instructions.starting position: Lying on a bench, feet on the ground at shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell with your hands in pronation above your chest, arms almost fully extended.
instructions.execution: With your elbows slightly bent, slowly lower the barbell behind your head in an arc. Once your arms are at your head level, slowly go back to the starting position.
